settings.title: CHANGING LIVES ONE INNOVATIVE SOCK AT A TIME
settings.content_text:
Clinically proven to increase circulation in your feet and lower legs in a trial at Yale School of Medicine.

The FDA has determined that Circufiber® socks are general wellness medical devices and Circufiber® socks have been awareded the APMA Seal of Acceptance.

85% of participants in a nationwide Quality of Life survey cited an improvement in one or more diabetes-related foot conditions after wearing Circufiber® socks for just 2 weeks.

Created with your footcare in mind, Circufiber socks feature our patent pending Infrared (IR) technology which has been clinically proven in a Yale published study to increase circulation in your feet and lower legs. Our socks are specially engineered to be super comfortable, easy to get on and off, and non-binding around the leg. Additionally, our socks provide light support and padding that has been clinically shown to reduce pain, blisters, moisture and pressures.
